name: Junius Ponds Cabins & Campground
description: Junius Ponds Cabins & Campground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Phelps, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: Northeast College of Health Sciences Health & Fitness Center
description: Northeast College of Health Sciences Health & Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Seneca Falls, NY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and trainers or lessons.

name: Sampson State Park
description: Sampson State Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willard, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Waterloo Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Waterloo Rec Center in Waterloo, NY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
